content:
✨ tuitube | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Downloading videos from various online platforms through an easy-to-use text-based interface.
✨ Key Features: • TUI for video downloads • Supports YouTube, X (Twitter), Twitch, Instagram, Bilibili, and more • Uses yt-dlp CLI for downloading • Cross-platform compatibility (macOS, Windows)
📖 Summary: Tuitube is a command-line interface (CLI) tool that provides a Text User Interface (TUI) for downloading videos from various popular platforms like YouTube, X (Twitter), Twitch, and Instagram. It leverages the power of yt-dlp to handle the actual downloading process.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
